name: GlossGenius Salon & Beauty Booking API
what_it_does: Mobile-first booking and business management platform for independent beauty professionals and small salons — enabling hairstylists, nail technicians, estheticians, and beauty freelancers to manage appointments, client records, payments (GlossGenius Card Reader), marketing, and a professional website, with a consumer marketplace for client discovery.
use_cases: Managing beauty appointment scheduling via GlossGenius API for multi-stylist management
Integrating booking data via GlossGenius API for business analytics and CRM
Automating client communications via GlossGenius API for appointment reminders
Syncing payment data via GlossGenius API for accounting and financial reporting
Building partner integrations via GlossGenius API for beauty tech ecosystem tools
not_for: Large enterprise salon chains (GlossGenius targets independent professionals and small studios)
Non-beauty services requiring general appointment management
best_when: An independent hairstylist, nail tech, or small beauty studio needs a mobile-first, all-in-one booking and payment platform with professional website generation and client marketplace access.
avoid_when: You need enterprise chain management, complex resource scheduling, or services outside the beauty/wellness industry.

auth.notes: No public API documented. GlossGenius is primarily a consumer-facing app platform without developer API access. Integration via Zapier only. No REST API, no webhooks, no SDK. Platform is closed ecosystem. Integration partners must contact GlossGenius directly for any data access.

pricing.notes: US company (New York City). Founded 2016 (Danielle Cohen-Shohet). $25M+ funding (a16z, Female Founders Fund). 70,000+ beauty professionals. Focused on independent stylists and boutique studios. Card reader hardware for in-person payments. Custom professional website (auto-generated). Client photos and portfolio. Marketing tools: email, text reminders. No-show fee protection. Waitlist management. Exclusively US market. No public API — closed platform. Very mobile-first design. Zapier integration for limited automation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: NO PUBLIC API. Closed platform. Zapier only. US market exclusively. No free tier. Credit card required. $24-120/month. 70K+ beauty professionals. Founded 2016. a16z-backed.
known_agent_gotchas: NO PUBLIC API — GlossGenius does not offer a REST API for third-party integration
Zapier is the only official automation path — very limited compared to direct API
US-only platform — not available outside United States
Closed ecosystem: no data export API, no webhook for real-time events
Contact partnerships@glossgenius.com for enterprise/partner integrations only

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced (app). PCI-DSS for payment processing (card reader). US company. No public API reduces external attack surface. Client PII and payment data stored by GlossGenius. Closed ecosystem — no third-party data access without partnership. US data residency. Card reader hardware — physical security considerations.
